goal: Build a recirculation-loop demo: 1 cube travels around a 2x0.6m closed-loop conveyor (4 segments). No robot — pure conveyor mechanics. Realizes #17 Postal Cross-Belt Sorter infrastructure (loop topology).
thoughts:
Six recirculation-loop specifics for CP-60:
1) Loop /World/Loop centered at [0, 0, 0.78], length 2.0m, width 0.6m, velocity 0.2.
2) 4 conveyor segments arranged as rectangle (Top moves +X, Right moves -Y, Bottom moves -X, Left moves +Y).
3) 1 cube starts on Top segment at [0, +0.3, 0.835]. Belt friction carries it +X.
4) When cube reaches end of Top, it falls onto Right segment (joins -Y motion).
5) Cube continues around loop. Demo of closed-loop topology.
6) Realizes #17 Postal Cross-Belt Sorter loop topology. Full scenario also adds robot + barcode_reader + vision-routing — combine for full pipeline.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Recirculation loop
create_recirculation_loop(
    loop_path="/World/Loop",
    center=[0, 0, 0.78],
    length=2.0,
    width=0.6,
    velocity=0.2,
)

# Test cube on Top segment
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0.3, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")
extension_notes: CP-60 demonstrates create_recirculation_loop (#17 infrastructure). 4 conveyor segments form a rectangular closed loop; cubes recirculate via belt friction. Full Postal Cross-Belt Sorter scenario adds robot + barcode + vision — combine with CP-33/47 patterns.
failure_modes: Cube must transition between segments — at corners belt direction changes 90°. Cube momentum may not carry into next segment. Real industrial loops have curved segments or transfer wheels.
Verify_args is approximate — recirculation loop isn't a typical pick-place flow.
Loop dimensions: 2.0×0.6m. Adjust for canonical scale needs.
verified_status: stable_fail; passes=0 n=14 wilson_lower=0.0; was form-gate-pending; demoted 2026-05-15

migration_deferred.details: Recirculation-loop conveyor demo; closed-loop multi-segment conveyor with no pick/sort — no pattern_hint covers conveyor topology
